_doc: D021b dependency metadata. Describes modules that lazysite's shipped code uses. Does NOT declare which modules exist - make-release.sh's strict-grep check greps the code and demands that every module it finds is listed here. To add a new dependency: add its entry, not just a use statement. Core-Perl modules are listed for completeness (Debian ships them in perl-modules-*; other distros include them with the perl package).

Cwd.used_by: path validation (realpath) across processor and manager-api

DB_File.used_by: rate limits: login, form submission, manager upload
DB_File._note: Bundled with perl core; links against libdb.

Digest::SHA.used_by: HMAC-SHA256 for auth cookies, CSRF tokens, form tokens; salted iterated SHA-256 password hashing

Encode.used_by: UTF-8 decoding of query-string values in processor

Fcntl.used_by: file locking (flock), O_RDWR/O_CREAT constants for DB_File ties

File::Find.used_by: cache walks, directory enumeration for audit and manager API

File::Temp.used_by: zip download tempfile, theme upload staging

IPC::Open2.used_by: users-admin child process, form webhook delivery with captured output

JSON::PP.used_by: manager API responses, form payloads, plugin --describe, SBOM/manifest output

LWP::UserAgent.used_by: remote content fetch for :::include and url: variables, form webhook delivery

POSIX.used_by: strftime for timestamps in logs, manifest, SBOM, zip filenames

Socket.used_by: SSRF guard: inet_aton / inet_ntoa for remote-fetch IP address checks

Time::HiRes.used_by: dev server request timing (optional; falls back when unavailable)

URI.used_by: URL parsing in SSRF guard and remote-fetch path resolution

environment.name: perl
environment.description: Perl runtime. Required version 5.10+. On Debian: 'perl'. On Alpine: 'perl'. On RHEL: 'perl'. Includes core modules listed above.

environment.name: Apache HTTP Server
environment.description: CGI host. Operator-provided. Any CGI/1.1-capable server works; Apache is the reference platform. The dev server (tools/lazysite-server.pl) is evaluation-only.
